title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Wyndham India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Wyndham India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Wyndham India in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Wyndham India:
Wyndham India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wyndham India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
